name: Trilogy Metals Inc.
summary: PARTI Our principal business is the exploration and development of the Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects (Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects or UKMP or UKMP Projects) located in the Ambler Mining District in Northwest Alaska, United States.
